items.title: Lionel Messi Leaves In Second Half Due To Injury, Inter Miami Rallies Past Union
items.summary: Lionel Messi headed into the World Cup break a bit earlier than planned, and now it’ll be Argentina waiting to see if there’s an injury to worry about.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Australia women's coach Shelley Nitschke signs three-year contract extension
items.summary: Will remain as Australia's women's coach until June 2029
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: How 'electric' Watkins forced his way back into Tuchel's England
items.summary: Match of the Day pundits Alan Shearer and Wayne Rooney praise Aston Villa's Ollie Watkins on his "unbelievable" hot streak since he was left out of the England squad in March.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
